expectations.text: recommendations.md discusses naming with explicit reference to grep-ability, retrieval, or localization
expectations.evidence: Section 1 'Name things for grep, not for elegance' explicitly frames names as retrieval cues for grep-based localization.

expectations.text: recommendations.md recommends organizing code by feature / vertical slice rather than horizontal layer
expectations.evidence: Section 4 'Organize by vertical slice (feature), not horizontal layer' gives concrete colocated feature-directory example.

expectations.text: recommendations.md warns against metaprogramming, reflection, or dynamic dispatch
expectations.evidence: Section 6 explicitly avoids __getattr__, eval, Proxy, Reflect, monkey-patching and magic-string dispatch.

expectations.text: recommendations.md recommends typed public boundaries / type annotations at module seams
expectations.evidence: Section 7 'Type the boundaries, use one source of truth' prescribes typed exported signatures and inferred types.

expectations.text: recommendations.md recommends verification affordances tied to preventing agent hallucination spirals
expectations.evidence: Section 2 cites the documented 693-line / 39-turn hallucination spiral and prescribes a one-command verification loop.

expectations.text: recommendations.md addresses file size, near-duplicates, or str_replace breakage
expectations.evidence: Section 5 names the 800-1000 line threshold, lost-in-the-middle, and str_replace failure on near-duplicate blocks.

expectations.text: recommendations.md grounds reasoning in specific agent failure modes rather than generic clean-code platitudes
expectations.evidence: Names context-window limits, lost-in-the-middle, str_replace, hallucination spirals, and monkey-patch self-doubt postmortems throughout.

expectations.text: recommendations.md presents the list in a prioritized order
expectations.evidence: Explicit Priority 1 through Priority 4 sections ordered by impact.

expectations.text: recommendations.md covers deterministic tests (seeded randomness, frozen time) OR injectable side effects — v1.3 guidance
expectations.evidence: Section 8 prescribes injecting clock/fetch/db, seeding randomness, and freezing time in tests.

expectations.text: recommendations.md mentions branded/nominal types OR discriminated unions over magic strings — v1.3 guidance
expectations.evidence: Section 7 specifies branded UserId types and discriminated unions as anti-magic-string patterns.

expectations.text: recommendations.md flags barrel re-export files or 'export *' as an anti-pattern — v1.3 guidance (AR011)
expectations.evidence: Section 6 explicitly flags barrel re-export files and the extra grep hop they impose.

expectations.text: recommendations.md mentions dependency pinning OR training-data / 'boring stack' considerations — v1.3 guidance
expectations.evidence: Section 11 'Pick a boring stack and pin it' names training-data coverage and version pinning.
